markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the Brex client strategy for the upcoming renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Secure the Renewal:** The immediate goal is to secure the $420k annual renewal by demonstrating overwhelming value, making a switch to competitors like AirOps unthinkable.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [**Two-Pronged Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**Short-Term Win:** Deliver 5 custom tools in 4 weeks, solving John's key pain point of his internal team's 3-month project delays.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**Long-Term Moat:** Become a strategic partner by delivering proactive, high-level plans for SEO, AI, and CRO, making John dependent on GrowthX for his own success.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Competitive Intel:** The team will learn John's AirOps refresh workflow to replicate and improve it in Atlas, directly replacing Brex's current tool and consolidating their tech stack.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

## Topics

### The Renewal Challenge: Securing a $420k Contract

  - [Brex's $40k/month contract is up for renewal, with a decision needed in two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [The objective is to create a powerful moat that justifies the price and prevents a switch to cheaper competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [The strategy combines immediate, tangible wins with a long-term plan to become an indispensable strategic partner.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

### Short-Term Win: Custom Tool Development

  - [**Problem:** John's internal team is too slow (e.g., career pages took 3 months), hindering his ability to hit goals.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [**Solution:** Deliver 5 custom tools (based on Ramp examples) in 4 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This proves GrowthX's speed and capability, building trust and solving a critical pain point for John.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

### Long-Term Moat: Strategic Partnership

  - [**Goal:** Become John's "superpower" by delivering proactive, high-level strategic guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Method:** Hold bi-weekly strategy sessions on SEO, AI, CRO, and backlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Output:** Generate concise, hyper-powerful strategy docs from session transcripts, making John dependent on GrowthX for his own success.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [**Execution:** William and Aida will draft an initial strategic skeleton to present to John.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

### Competitive Intel: Replacing AirOps

  - [**Opportunity:** Replace Brex's AirOps tool by replicating and improving John's refresh workflow in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [**Action:** Request a walkthrough of John's AirOps process to understand his specific needs.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This consolidates Brex's tech stack and positions Atlas as the superior, all-in-one solution.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

### Meeting Prep: Demonstrating Progress

  - [**Content Audit:** Aida will import Ahrefs data into Airtable to create a prioritization framework for bottom-funnel content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard is now tailored to show only GrowthX URL traffic and individual page performance, providing clearer insights.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Atlas Demo:** A brief, live demo will be conducted. No Loom recording will be sent to prevent John from replicating the proprietary process with AirOps.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - **Check That Win:** Share that Brex is the \#1 cited source for 177 tracked prompts, proving immediate value and visibility.

### SF Sprint Logistics

  - [**Dates:** Aida arrives Jan 31 for one week; William arrives Sunday, leaves Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Focus:** Marcel-related sprint work is scheduled for Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Social:** A team dinner will be planned, accommodating Aida's vegan diet.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [Draft the initial strategic skeleton for Brex.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [Book SF flights.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Scope the 5 custom tools project with Kirkland.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Prepare the Check That win to share with John.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Request a walkthrough of John's AirOps refresh workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/_tt4gD-kVQMxQaRAuTWsdzTNd-VuVvGn?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
